ats_utilities.logging.ilogger_manager module¶

Module

ilogger_manager.py

Info

Defines abstract class ILoggerManager with method(s). Interface for the ATS logging manager mechanism.

class ats_utilities.logging.ilogger_manager.ILoggerManager[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class ILoggerManager with method(s). Interface for the ATS logging manager mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
get_logger - Gets logger instance.
write_log - Writes message to log output.
ok - Checks if logger manager component is ok.
__str__ - Returns the ATS logger manager as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract get_logger() → ILogger[source]¶

Gets logger instance.

Returns:

Logger instance

Return type:

<ILogger>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract ok() → bool[source]¶

Checks if logger component is ok.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail)

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract write_log(message: str | None, ctrl: int) → bool[source]¶

Writes message to log output.

Parameters:

  • message (<Optional[str]>) – Log message in string format for log output | None

  • ctrl (<int>) – Control flag (debug, warning, critical, errors, info)

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail)

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
